name: gobs-loop
description: Slash-style entry point for the GOBS guarded multi-agent development workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Slash entry for the guarded GOBS 4+1 workflow
interface.longDescription: Use GOBS Loop to enter the repo's guarded Planner -> Challenger -> Builder -> Verifier workflow through a shorter slash-style command while still reusing the core repo skill.
defaultPrompt: /gobs-loop bootstrap a run and drive this task with the guarded 4+1 workflow
/gobs-loop use the guarded workflow for this task
/gobs-loop keep my manual coordination low and move this implementation forward
